response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the first verse of 'Koisuru Fortune Cookie' by AKB48, as performed by Yuzuki Choco and Shirogane Noel. The reference JSON provided lyrics that match this specific vocal sequence. I have synchronized the subtitles to the vocal starts, ensuring that the 'e' timestamps do not overlap with subsequent lines. I also included the on-screen song title as a secondary priority.
